subcodes.first_line: O Majíd! Verily, I shall never forget thee in any moment of time, and We have loved thee in truth at all times when We make mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مجید انا ماانساک فی حین من الاحیان و احببناک بالحق فی کل حین اذا اذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort
